que: What is the primary purpose of the SnackBar widget in Flutter?
options: To display permanent banners at the top
To display a brief message at the bottom of the screen

options: The main content widget of the snackbar

Which parameter sets the background color of a SnackBar?

options: Critical system alerts that must not be missed
Brief messages and feedback such as form submissions
